mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunk_vector ( content, embedding, file_name, chunk_index, content_hash, status, start_time, end_time, doc_type, doc_id, chunk_id, version ) VALUES ( #{content}, CAST(#{embedding} AS vector), #{fileName}, #{chunkIndex}, #{contentHash}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{docType}, #{docId}, #{chunkId}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, content, file_name, chunk_index, doc_type, doc_id, chunk_id, version, status, start_time, end_time, created_at, (1 - (embedding <=> CAST(#{embedding} AS vector))) AS score FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY embedding <=> CAST(#{embedding} AS vector) LIMIT 30
SELECT DISTINCT file_name FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE file_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY file_name
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT file_name) FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE file_name IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE document_chunk_vector SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT doc_id FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE file_name = #{fileName} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE document_chunk_vector SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id, content, embedding, file_name AS fileName, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, created_at AS createdAt, status, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, doc_type AS docType, content_hash AS contentHash, doc_id AS docId, chunk_id AS chunkId, version FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND version = #{version} ORDER BY chunk_index

SELECT file_name, doc_id, version, status, COUNT(*) AS chunk_count, MIN(created_at) AS created_at, MIN(start_time) AS start_time, MAX(end_time) AS end_time FROM document_chunk_vector WHERE file_name = #{fileName} GROUP BY file_name, doc_id, version, status ORDER BY version DESC
